verses.text: Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei-ah Topa in Moses kiangah
“Amaute in amau' neih a luah uh sung panin ten'na dingin Levi mite tungah khuapite a piak dingun Israel mite thu pia in. Khuapi kiima lonona gamte Levi mite tungah na pia ding hi
Khuapite pen amau' ten'na hi ding a, a lonona gamte pen amau' bawngte leh a inn ganhingte leh a ganhing khempeuh uh-a' ding ahi hi
Levi mite tungah na piak ding uh khuapi lonona gamte pen khuapikulh panin a kimkot pi tul leh zanga ciang ban ding hi

Khuapi laizang panin na teh ding a, nisuahna lampang pi tul thum, leitaw lampang pi tul thum, nitumna lampang pi tul thum, leilu lampang pi tul thum hi ding a, a laizangah khuapi om ding hi. Hih pen amau' khuapi lonona taanggam dingin a neih ding uh ahi hi
Levi mite tungah na piak uh khuapite pen bukna khuapi gukte hi ding a, mi thatte tua lai-ah na taisak ding uh a, tuate' banah khuapi sawmli leh nih na pia thuah ding uh hi
Levi mite tungah na piak ding uh khuapi vekpi sawmli leh giat hi-in, a lonona gamte tawh hi ding hi

Israel mite' neihsa sung panin na piak ding khuapite pen minam tamte tung panin tam la-in, minam tawmte tung panin tawm na la ding hi. Amau' luah gamh tawh a kizui-in Levi mite tungah a khuapite uh a piak ciat ding uh ahi hi,” a ci hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Jordan kantanin Kanaan gamah na tun' uh ciangin
sawmlopi-in mi khatpeuh a thatkha mi thatte a va tai theihna ding, note-a' dingin bukna khuapi dingin khuapite na teel ding uh hi
Thu kikhen dingin mihonpi mai-ah a din' ma-in mi thatte a sihlohna dingin tua khuapite pen phulapa' kiang panin note-a' dingin bukna hi ding hi
Na piak uh tua khuapite, note' bukna khuapi gukte hi ding hi
Bukna khuapi dingin Jordan galkhatah khuapi thum, Kanaan gamah khuapi thum na teel ding uh hi
Sawmlopi-in mi khatpeuh a thatkhate a tai theihna dingin hih khuapi gukte pen Israel mite, khualmite, leh note' lakah a peemte-a' dingin bukna hi ding hi
“Ahih hangin mi khat in na-a kizang sik khat tawh midang khat satin a sih leh, amah mi that hi a, tua mi thatpa kithat ding hi
Amah in mi a sih theihna ding mah ahi a khutsunga om suang khat tawh a suk a, a sih leh, amah mi that hi a, tua mi thatpa kithat ding hi
Tua ahih kei leh, amah in mi a sih theihna ding ahi a khutsunga om sing a kibawl hiam khat tawh amah a sat a, a sih leh, mi that hi a, tua mi thatpa kithat ding hi
A kinaipih pen khat in a phu la-in mi thatpa that ding a, amah a tuahna peuhah that ding hi
“Amah in muhdahna tawh sunin, ahih kei leh bukin a khawh-a a sih leh
tua ahih kei leh galbawlna tawh a khutin tumin a sih leh, tua a tumpa kithat ding hi. Amah mi that hi a, a phulapa in a tuah ciangin tua mipa that ding hi
“Ahih hangin galbawl lopi-in thakhatin amah sunin, ahih kei leh buk lopi-in na khatpeuh tawh amah khawhin
ahih kei leh, amah pen ama gal hilo, ama siatna ding a zong hilo napi-in, mi a sih theihna ding suang khat zangin a muh lohpi-in amah in deng kha-in a sih leh
tua mi thatpa leh a phulapa' kikalah hih ngeina kipte tawh kizui-in mihonpi in khen ding hi

A phulapa' khutsung panin mihonpi in mi thatpa honkhia-in, mihonpi in amah a va taina, bukna khuapi-ah amah puakkik ding a, sathau siangtho a kinilh siampi lianpenpa a sih matengin tua khua-ah a teng ding hi
Ahih hangin hun khat peuhpeuhah amah a taina bukna khuapi gamgi khengin a pai a
a phulapa in ama bukna khuapi daihual pualamah amah mu-in, a phulapa in mi thatpa a thah leh, tua a thatpa mawhlo ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh siampi lianpenpa a sih matengin tua mipa a bukna khuapi sungah a om ding ahi hi. Ahih hangin siampi lianpenpa a sih khit ciangin mi thatpa a neihsa leitangah ciahkik thei ding hi.
“Hihte pen na ten'na khempeuh uhah na khang tawntungun thukham leh ngeina hi ding hi
Khatpeuh in mi khat a thah leh, tecite' genna siksanin mi thatpa kithat ding hi. Ahih hangin teci khat bek' teci pan'na siksanin kuamah kithatlo ding hi
Tua thamloin, sihna thuak dingin a kilawm mipa tatna ding sum na sang kei ding uh hi; amah kithat ding hi
Siampi lianpenpa a sih ma-in bukna khuapi-ah a taisa mipa a gamah a ciahkik theihna dingin ama nuntakna tatna ding sum na sang kei ding uh hi
Na ten'na uh leitang na ninsak kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mi thahna in leitang ninsak a, a that mipa a kithah kei buang leh, tua mi kithahna leitang sian'sakna ding thudang om theilo hi
A laizangah keimah ka ten'na leitang na ninsak kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa keimah, Israel mite' laizangah ka teng hi, ci hi, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi.
